title: Self-Supervised Learning of Structured Dynamics from Videos
innovation_summary: Self-Supervised Learning of Structured Dynamics from Videos: We propose the Structured Dynamics Model (SDM), which explicitly separates the dominant source of temporal change from residual dynamics through future-feature prediction, rather than representing video.
